What We Do
End-to-End Sourcing
& Logistics Services

Everything you need to source, inspect, and ship from China and Thailand to your destination worldwide.

How It Works
Simple 4-Step Process

From your first inquiry to final delivery, our proven process keeps everything transparent and on track.

1
Share Requirements
Tell us what product you need, your budget, timeline, and quality expectations.
2
We Source & Verify
Our team identifies verified factories and sends you the best quotes and samples.
3
Inspect & Approve
We conduct thorough quality inspection and send you detailed photo/video reports before shipment.
4
Ship & Deliver
Goods are shipped via your preferred mode — sea, air, or express — with real-time tracking.

Why Choose Us
A Partner You Can
Actually Trust

With over a decade of on-ground experience in China and Thailand, we are not middlemen — we are your local team.

  • ✓

    Real Boots on the Ground

    Our team physically visits factories in China and Thailand — no remote guesswork, ever.

  • ✓

    Transparent Pricing

    No hidden commissions. You see exactly what you pay for factory, freight, and our service fee.

  • ✓

    Bilingual Team

    Fluent in Chinese, Thai, and English — we bridge the language gap so nothing gets lost.

  • ✓

    End-to-End Accountability

    From first inquiry to final delivery, one team manages your entire supply chain.

  • ✓

    500+ Verified Factory Network

    We have pre-vetted relationships with hundreds of quality-certified manufacturers across China.

Leadership
Meet Our CEO
Syed Wahaj
Founder & CEO
A seasoned global trade professional with deep roots in China-Thailand supply chains. Syed Wahaj founded Novexa to give international buyers direct, trustworthy access to verified Asian manufacturers — eliminating risk, reducing costs, and building long-term partnerships.
